body_txt: However, perhaps due to the nature of cute designs, most artists will simply draw the character physically as a child. This also allows for any humor related to that, rather than specifically related to height. Characters like this may also fall under Cute Critters Act Childlike , if their behavior matches their childlike appearance. See also Really 700 Years Old and Older Than They Look . Can often be Truth in Television . Contrast Huge Schoolgirl . Not necessarily related to fantasy dwarves , though it can still apply to them or other short fantasy humanoids.
